name: Video Segmenter
description: Splits a local video into short batch-ready clips for downstream Batch or LLM analysis nodes.

outputSchema.name: Segments
outputSchema.description: Array of generated video segments, each with index, start_sec, end_sec, local_path, and mime_type.

zh-CN.name: 视频分段器
zh-CN.description: 把本地视频切分成适合后续 Batch 或 LLM 节点逐段分析的短视频片段，并返回每段的时间范围和本地文件路径。

en-US.name: Video Segmenter
en-US.description: Splits a local video into short clips for downstream Batch or LLM analysis nodes, returning each segment time range and local file path.
